'''Chooru Delb''' was a noted [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] actor shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. His most famous part was the [[Vosdia Nooma|title role]] in ''[[The Trickery of Vosdia Nooma]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
